page_metadata.biotools__summary: Homology-based method, which predicts a membrane protein’s position within a lipid bilayer. It projects the results of coarse-grained molecular dynamics simulations onto any membrane protein structure or sequence provided by the user.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Homology-based method, which predicts a membrane protein’s position within a lipid bilayer. It projects the results of coarse-grained molecular dynamics simulations onto any membrane protein structure or sequence provided by the user.
